title: Welcome to PasabayBCD!
body: Thank you for joining. Start by booking your first shared delivery.

title: Weekend Promo!
body: Get 15% off your next booking this Saturday & Sunday.

title: Top-Up Successful
body: Your wallet has been topped up with ₱500 via GCash.

title: App Update Available
body: PasabayBCD v1.1 is now available. Update for new features!

title: Booking Time Accuracy Improved!
body: Great news! We have successfully updated our system to synchronize with Philippine Standard Time (GMT+8). All your booking records and \"Booked On\" dates will now show the correct local time. Thank you for your continued support!

title: Fast & Reliable Deliveries with PasabayBCD!
body: Need to move cargo across Bacolod? Check out our updated fleet and real-time tracking features. High-capacity trucks are now available for booking! Book your next delivery today.

title: More Drivers in Your Area! 🚙
body: Good news! We\'ve onboarded 50+ new drivers today to ensure your cargo gets picked up faster than ever.

title: 📦 Packing Fragile Items?
body: Don\'t forget to double-wrap your delicate cargo! Check out our in-app guide for safe and secure packing tips.

title: Refer a Friend, Get ₱100! 🎁
body: Share PasabayBCD with another merchant. When they complete their first booking, you both get ₱100 in your wallet.

title: ⚠️ Low Wallet Balance
body: Your balance is below P50. Top up now to ensure your next booking goes through smoothly.

title: 🏷️ 15% OFF Voucher!
body: Use code PASABAY15 on your next shipment to get an instant discount. Limited time only!

title: 🌙 Late Night Special
body: Shipping late? Enjoy flat rates on all deliveries booked between 10 PM and 5 AM.

title: 🆕 New Booking Nearby
body: There is a new cargo request just 2km away from your current location. Tap to view!

title: 👋 Welcome to Pasabay!
body: Welcome aboard! Complete your first booking today and get your first 5km for free.
